Uses of Class
agilitycompetition.Date

    • Uses of Date in agilitycompetition

      Methods in agilitycompetition that return Date 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      Date Dog.getBirthDate()
      Accessor for birthdate
      Date Contest.getContestDate()
      Accessor for Contest Date
      Methods in agilitycompetition with parameters of type Date 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      int Date.compareTo(Date that)
      compareTo (abstract method of the Comparable Interface) is
      implemented to impose a natural ordering on a group of objects.
      compareTo is used by the Collections.sort routine to allow us to sort
      the Dog belonging to some Java collection by birthdate.
      double Date.difference(Date that)
      calculates the difference between two dates as an absolute value
      of the two day numbers.
      Constructors in agilitycompetition with parameters of type Date 
      Constructor and Description
      Competitor(Date birthDate, java.lang.String breed, double weight, java.lang.String name, java.lang.String owner, ElapsedTime time)
      Parameterized Constructor for Competitor
      Contest(java.lang.String location, java.lang.String sponsor, Date date)
      Parameterized Constructor
      Dog(Date dob, java.lang.String breed, double weight)
      Parameterized Constructor for the Dog class.
      Pet(Date birthDate, java.lang.String breed, double weight, java.lang.String name, java.lang.String owner)
      Parameterized Constructor for Pet.
